violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the front, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 12/13/2025

The dumpster outside is located on loose rock. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. New Violation. Correct By: 12/13/2025

Inspector observed back stock is pushed up against the walls, preventing pest control from monitoring rodent activity in several areas. Items in the storage room are stacked against the walls, there must be at least 12 inches away from the wall, allowing for inspection and treatment of pest. Stock room observed to be overstocked with pallets of product. Storage area must be arranged so that there is an adequate perimeter along the walls and between pallets. Stock room and office area must be properly arranged and maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2023
